description:
# Project Artifact Persistence

Persist ceremony reports and changelogs as structured artifacts on the project. Maintain an artifact index. Everything stored in .automaker/projects/{slug}/artifacts/.

## Phases
1. Artifact storage service + ceremony report persistence
2. Changelog persistence + escalation artifact recording
title: [Epic] Project Artifact Persistence
